title: Tar1q's Pack
description: My 1.20.1 modpack. A balance of different mods to make the world have a bit more depth.
body: This is just a modpack that I made to play with my friends. So what's in it? Basically any mod under the sun that I think provides a deeper experience than vanilla, so expect to see mods like Create, Farmer's Delight, Better Combat, and a variety of structure mods. World gen has also been overhauled with many more cave biomes and features, along with surface generation with William Wyther's Expanded Ecosphere, providing stunning views that you can render without killing your computer with the help of Distant Horizons. In essence this modpack focuses on adventure and exploration, but touches on all aspects of the game, even allowing you to go to space with Ad Astra.
